name: tailored-design-solutions
description: INTERIORIX — business platform for interior and exterior design projects.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev --workspace=@tailored/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=@tailored/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@tailored/shared && npm run build --workspace=@tailored/ui && npm run build --workspace=@tailored/backend && npm run build --workspace=@tailored/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@tailored/backend && npm run lint --workspace=@tailored/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=@tailored/ui && npm run lint --workspace=@tailored/shared
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run smoke && npm run test:e2e
scripts.db:migrate: echo "MongoDB: no migrations — use npm run seed"
scripts.db:reset: echo "Reset MongoDB manually or drop database, then npm run seed"
